title: ononis tournefortii f. purpurea
intro: Ononis tournefortii f. purpurea, also known as the Spurred Spleenwort, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and skin problems. The health benefits of Ononis tournefortii f. purpurea include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
